column1: Hey Michal, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
It starts March 7th and it's that week
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
bettt thats where I'll be too. will be dope to have you with us
how many ppl in your group?
thats solid for sure. which school you all from?
oh bet yea we have a few groups from Ole Miss rolling with us this spring
Y'all def know how to party lol
are you in greek life or nah
We're in sororitys (adpi and phi mu)
Wait are you friends with Sofia LOL
okay dope. happy to help y'all out
I know 😂😂 we just really wanna get out spring break figured out
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
word! we def wanna move quick, things have been selling out for certain weeks
whats your email? ill send everything to both of you
What would be the cost for this per person
sending it all now was waiting on Sofia's email. cool if I do a group email?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
hey saw you clicked into the Riu Republica punta Cana option. did you mean to start that reservation or were you just clicking around
I was just clicking to see what's the plan
word all good. how we feelin bout it all so far
How do I make sure me and Sofia will be together in the same room
I just reserved a spot but haven't made the payment yet
Were y'all ready to deposit and secure tonight? I can update that one you have so that you can send it out to each member of the group. you'll all be able to follow the same link once I update it
We will have the deposit by end of this week
What do I send to the members of the group
I'll send you a new email with the reservation link and how it all works. how many slots do we need for the squad?
word I'll open up 12 slots for now and we'll adjust
Wed/Thurs good for y'all for deposits?
Yea I got the dates. Im talkin about for making your deposits to reserve the booking
Yea that's good for our deposit
Okay bet. gonna send you an email with everything right now. its the same reservation link you put your name in
And do they just join it

yea so youll send them this link. and they'll hit the yellow 'Join this trip' button. itll take them to the reservation page, there they'll each join an open TBA slot. from there itll prompt them to make an account same way you did, and then make their deposit
Peep the email I just sent tho, has a lot more info and step by step how to navigate the reservation
heyy Michal whats up, how we feelin with things so far?
Great gonna get it payed by tonight!!
Is there any chance to delete room 3 and make room 2 into a 3 person room
Ok perfect how do I do that
Would my name be under the reservation when we get there
Our whole on site team is gonna be there when you arrive ready to help you all with everything
Just enter you flight info onto your account when you get it, so that we can schedule your airport transportation for when you land

When you land we'll have staff there to help you with your bags, get you on the bus, and to the resort. once you get to the resort there will be more members of our team there to help you with check in
Each member of your groups name will be attached to their room reservation
Hey just wondering... would we be able to add one more person to the reservation
yea we can add one more person to the 2nd room. they ready to pay rn?
Wait actually can we just add another room for 3 people
Are they ready to deposit rn?
yo michal whats good! whenever y'all can, you can start having everyone enter their flight info onto their accounts
hey are Rae, Francesca, or Sophie on the same flight as you?
word will add those in for them
Just wondering what kind of boat is the bruise cruise on
yoo mb i missed this, but they are usually catamaran's
Do we all need to do an e-ticket
Yea I'll send that info via email soon!
hey just emailed over the e-ticket info and where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to get any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Yes we want to do the booze cruise
okay bet! booze cruise is super lit. I'll add it into each of your accounts for you
What's all included in the coco bango package
And what day would the cruise be
we accidentally added the coco bongo party package, can you remove it from our package
yea I can delete if you want! but it comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
Ok yea can u remove it for now
And what day is the booze cruise
that'll be assigned when you get there but as of right now Tuesday the 10th!
Hey can you get rid of coco bango for care collier
yo! safe travels today. see y'all out here soon
When we land in Punta Cana will the person picking us up have a sign with one of our names? And if so, whose name?

yo! when y'all land go through customs, baggage claim, follow the traffic out, you'll hook a hard left into he exit lobby. you'll see our transportation staff in a blue shirt that says Go Blue Tours, they'll also be holding a Go Blue Tours sign. head directly to them
they'll check you off the list and help you to the shuttle van that'll take you to the resort
big day today tho! travel safe. I'll see y'all out here
Our flight got a bit delayed we land at 1:56 instead of 1:36
All good ops team is tracking your flight #
Hi just wondering tomorrow for the booze cruise, if it at 11 when and where should we meet whoever is taking us
There's gonna be hundreds of others going at the same time so you won't miss it lol
Do we need to be there before 11
Yea def get there before then
